message:
fix(tui): derive screen navigation hints from registry instead of hardcoding (br-1xt0m.1.1.1)

Replace hardcoded "1-8" in GLOBAL_KEYBINDINGS (tui_chrome.rs) with
dynamic jump_key_legend() which reflects the actual screen count from
ALL_SCREEN_IDS. With 14 screens the hint now correctly shows
"1-9,0,!,@,#,$" instead of the stale "1-8".

Also adds doc comment to JUMP_BINDING_LABEL sentinel in tui_keymap.rs
explaining that help_entries() replaces it with the dynamic legend,
plus 3 guard assertion tests ensuring hints can never drift from the
registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
